title: Google Antigravity CLI Full Walkthrough
summary: Google Antigravity is an agent-first software development platform that enables developers to build, orchestrate, and monitor AI agents. The platform connects AI agents to code editors, terminals, and browsers to perform development tasks autonomously. A new CLI component was released.
